title: Find someone who's done it before.
body: Search by category, browse curated picks, or follow a share link from a professional you know. Every listing carries real ratings + a verified credentials badge.

title: Pay once. Money sits in escrow.
body: Pick a slot, pay with card or bank transfer. Your money is held until the call is delivered — no subscriptions, no hidden fees, no recurring anything.

title: Talk. Get paid. Or get refunded.
body: Join with one tap when it's call time. The professional gets paid the moment it ends. If they don't show up, you get every naira back, automatically.
